title: Dashboard View - Linked Charts

posts.author: tslater (Trevor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there any way to pull in already created charts from the boards you selected to be part of the dashboard?

One could accomplish this through selecting a chart nested within the Choose Board “Selected Boards”

2022-08-25_16-05-42481×558 26.2 KB

Or if while you were creating a new chart it gave you the option to link to an already created chart ID
